title: m9_media
steps: Mix the ingredients (forms white precipitate but is dissolved after steering), filter sterilize, and store at room temperature. Composition Required Stock Vol(ml)/L Vol(ml)/500mL 1 M9 Salts 1X 5X 200 100 2 Magnesium sulfate 2mM 1M 2 1 3 Calcium chloride 0.1mM 1M 0.1 0.05 4 Vitamin B1 1ug/mL 10mg.mL 0.1 0.05 5 Carbon source as required as required 6 Distilled water up to 1000mL up to 500mL
